goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'stevenage' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should 'leave after 15:30'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should be in the 'centre' and should have 'a star of 0'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'address', and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from stevenage and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on sunday and should leave after 15:30
Make sure you get train ID and arrival time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should be in the centre and should have a star of 0
Make sure you get phone number, address, and postcode
